sentences.english: I like potato chips. I really love the salty and crispy taste. I also like chocolates and candy bars. I'm not very disciplined about eating healthy. I eat what I want, and junk food is definitely my weakness.
sentences.korean: 감자칩을 좋아해요. 짭짤하고 바삭한 맛을 정말 좋아하고요. 초콜릿과 캔디바도 좋아해요.

sentences.english: My favorite junk food has to be gummy bears, Starbursts, and Skittles. I just love candy. I like the way they taste and the texture. I eat too much of it, but it makes me happy. Sweets are my weakness.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 정크푸드는 구미 베어, 스타버스트, 스키틀즈예요. 사탕을 정말 좋아해요.

sentences.english: I love crisps — that's what we call potato chips in England. I also love chocolate and cakes. I enjoy baking too, which probably means I eat too many cakes. But it's all part of enjoying life, right?
sentences.korean: 감자칩을 좋아해요 — 영국에서는 'crisps'라고 불러요. 초콜릿과 케이크도 좋아해요.

sentences.english: My favorite junk food is McDonald's breakfast. I love their sausage and egg McMuffin and their hash browns. When I have time, I'll stop there on my way to work. It's not the healthiest, but it tastes so good.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 정크푸드는 맥도날드 아침이에요. 소시지 에그 맥머핀과 해시브라운을 좋아해요. 시간이 있으면 출근길에 들러요.

sentences.english: I'm a huge junk food fanatic. I love chips and chocolate. I could eat these all day. I try to have some restraint, but it's difficult. My weakness is definitely salty and sweet combinations. Chips with chocolate is the ultimate treat.
sentences.korean: 정크푸드 광이에요. 칩과 초콜릿을 좋아하고 하루 종일 먹을 수 있어요.

sentences.english: I try to stay healthy, but I do have my moments. I'll occasionally indulge in fast food or sweets. But I try not to make it a habit. I prefer to eat a balanced diet with occasional treats rather than eating junk food regularly.
sentences.korean: 건강하게 먹으려 하지만, 가끔은 빠질 때가 있어요. 때때로 패스트푸드나 과자를 즐기기도 해요.

quiz.question: What does '광팬, 열성가' mean in English?
